## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Verification

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Smoke training run when behavior or performance changed

## Screenshots Or Artifacts

Include replay, metrics, or docs screenshots for visual changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Tests or a clear testing rationale are included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Generated artifacts are not committed unless intentionally curated.
- [ ] Security, determinism, and reproducibility impacts were considered.
